data.title: DDOS Protection
data.description: Layered security measures to prevent Distributed Denial of Service attacks.
data.technical_spec: Employs Cloudflare and AWS Shield Advanced.

data.title: Encryption of Data in Transit
data.description: Data transmitted between services is encrypted to prevent interception.
data.technical_spec: Uses TLS 1.2 and above for secure communication.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Routine audits ensure compliance with security standards and identify vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Follows ISO 27001 standards for security assessments.

data.title: Vulnerability Management
data.description: Consistent monitoring and patching of system vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Uses automated scanning tools like Nessus.

data.title: AI-driven Threat Detection
data.description: Integration of AI systems to detect unusual patterns and potential threats.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes machine learning algorithms for anomaly detection.
